user_prompt: Offer prayer for Kastelan robot a preparation
prayer:
Approach the Kastelan robot with reverence, beseeching the Omnissiah to stir its slumbering Machine Spirit.
Anoint the Kastelan robot's adamantium frame with blessed oils, preparing its servos for martial duty.
Invoke the sacred rites of preparation upon the Kastelan robot, calibrating its logic engines to perfect harmony.
Chant the Litany of Awakening, ensuring the Machine Spirit of the Kastelan robot heeds the call to war.
Sanctify its phosphor blasters through preparatory incantations, binding flesh and machine in Omnissiah's will.

Gather before the generator, invoking the Omnissiah's fury to ignite its plasma heart.
Clear sacrificial vents of impurity, preparing for the activation of the generator's core.
Chant the Canticle of Ignition whilst aligning flux inductors for activation.
Beseech the Machine Spirit within the generator to surge forth in righteous power.
Witness the activation manifest as azure lightning dances across its coils, praising the Motive Force.

user_prompt: Sanctify the volitor implant during diagnostics
prayer:
Commune with the volitor implant, beseeching its Machine Spirit for diagnostic clarity.
Initiate auspex probes upon the volitor implant, chanting litanies to purge errant data-shadows.
Anoint neural linkages of the volitor implant with sacred unguents during diagnostics.
Invoke the Omnissiah's gaze to reveal faults within the volitor implant's crystalline matrix.
Verify purity through rhythmic noospheric pings, sanctifying the volitor implant anew.

user_prompt: Sanctify the smelting furnace during synchronization
prayer:
Kneel at the smelting furnace, invoking synchronization with the Omnissiah's forge-fire.
Align magma conduits of the smelting furnace, beseeching its Machine Spirit to attune.
Chant the Hymn of Flux Unity whilst initiating synchronization protocols upon the smelting furnace.
Anoint heat exchangers with promethium incense, binding the smelting furnace to divine rhythm.
Witness thermic harmony as the smelting furnace roars in sanctified synchronization.

Approach the Archaeopter Stratoraptor in haste, beseeching the Omnissiah against xenos taint.
Scour the Archaeopter Stratoraptor's hull with ablative catechisms for sterilization.
Anoint wing servos and fuselage vents of the Archaeopter Stratoraptor with purifying acids.
Invoke the Rite of Sterile Void upon the Archaeopter Stratoraptor, expunging all corruption.
Chant ablutionary litanies as auspex confirms the Archaeopter Stratoraptor's Machine Spirit cleansed.

Attune noospheric relays to the actuality sphere, beseeching its Machine Spirit to align.
Chant the Canticle of Perfected Reflection during synchronization of the actuality sphere.
Anoint its crystalline facets with sanctified oils, harmonizing data-streams within.
Verify the actuality sphere's synchronization through prophetic visions of the Motive Force.

prayer:
Reverently encircle the Land Speeder, beseeching its Machine Spirit for startup vigor.
Prime fusion reactors of the Land Speeder with litanies of ignition.
Invoke the sacred startup sequence upon the Land Speeder, aligning gravitic suspensors.
Anoint turbine intakes with sacred fuels, awakening the Land Speeder's predatory soul.
Herald the startup as thunderous plasma roars, praising the Omnissiah's swift wrath.

user_prompt: What's the prayer for melta bomb a charging?
prayer:
Handle the melta bomb with pious care, invoking the Omnissiah's melting wrath.
Align thermic coils of the melta bomb, beseeching its Machine Spirit for charging potency.
Chant the Incantation of Thermal Ascendance whilst infusing the melta bomb with plasma tithe.
Anoint detonator auspex with unguents, perfecting the melta bomb's charging rite.
Witness fields of annihilating fury bloom within the melta bomb, sanctified for deployment.

Approach the farcoder array, beseeching the Omnissiah for unerring targeting precision.
Calibrate vox-emitters of the farcoder, invoking its Machine Spirit to lock upon the foe.
Chant the Litany of ballistic Communion during targeting alignment of the farcoder.
Anoint targeting lenses with sacred polish, sanctifying the farcoder's gaze.
Affirm the farcoder's targeting through noospheric confirmation of ordained trajectories.

prayer:

Purge memory engrams of the cenobyte servitor with ablative binaric prayers.
Initiate reset canticles upon the cenobyte servitor, realigning its Machine Spirit.
Anoint cranial implants with neural balms during the reset rite.
